qa_pairs.question: How can I add a new role if I want to have multiple roles?
qa_pairs.answer: To add a new role when you want to have several, go to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role and click on “disable old roles” on that page.

qa_pairs.question: Is it possible to submit multiple applications for roles?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, it is possible to submit several applications.

qa_pairs.question: How many of my submitted roles can be set as primary?
qa_pairs.answer: You can only set one of them as your primary role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I'm trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.
